ruleBookInfo.init:
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result); var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()); var book = { name: o('h1').match(/《(.+)》/)[1].replace(/\s.*/,''), author: o('#xxlist li:eq(4)').replace(/.*：/,''), kind: o('#xxlist li:eq(1)').replace(/.*：/,'').replace(/\s-\s/,','), wordCount: o('#xxlist li:eq(3)').replace(/.*：/,''), latest: o('#xxlist li:eq(6)'), intro: '
' + J.select('.con_text p').html(), cover: J.select('.con_text img').attr('src'), url: J.select('.downlistbox a:eq(0)').attr('href') +',{charset:"gbk"}', }; book;
ruleBookInfo.name: name
